decisions.label: Hillion--Johnson 2016
decisions.reason: Supplies the two cubic propagation inequalities, but no first-descent mass windows or variance synthesis.

decisions.label: Bobkov--Marsiglietti--Melbourne 2022
decisions.reason: Supplies the lattice max-atom/variance inequality, but contains no adjacent-mass curvature bound.

decisions.label: Darroch 1964
decisions.reason: Locates a mode relative to the mean without quantifying a three-mass descent.

decisions.label: Pitman 1997
decisions.reason: Bounds ratios through tilted laws, not neighbouring-ratio curvature normalized by the original variance.

decisions.label: Duembgen--Wellner 2020
decisions.reason: Gives qualitative decrease of an index-weighted density ratio, with no finite variance-scale constant.

decisions.label: Johnson 2017
decisions.reason: The c-log-concavity constant is in a different normalization and can be arbitrarily smaller than 1/V.

decisions.label: Baillon--Cominetti--Vaisman 2016
decisions.reason: Sharp one-atom anti-concentration contains no adjacent masses.

decisions.label: Gnedin 2024
decisions.reason: Refines modal location and stability, not local descent magnitude.

decisions.label: Tang--Tang survey
decisions.reason: No finite first-descent curvature theorem or implication was found.

decisions.label: Marsiglietti--Melbourne ULC(n) estimate
decisions.reason: The same-three-mass inequality is normalized by summand count; an explicit variance-one family makes its bound tend to zero.

decisions.label: Fontana--Semeraro 2025
decisions.reason: Studies fibers of generally dependent Bernoulli representations and does not characterize the independent subclass.

decisions.label: Brazitikos--Pafis 2026
decisions.reason: Uses ordinary discrete log-concavity for random-polytope thresholds, with no quantitative modal curvature.

decisions.label: Gaxiola--Melbourne--Pigno--Pollard 2025
decisions.reason: Bounds variance through one selected or maximal atom; no adjacent masses occur.

decisions.label: Jakimiuk--Murawski--Nayar--Slobodzianiuk 2024
decisions.reason: Optimizes atom/variance quantities for log-concave and ULC laws, not three-mass curvature.

decisions.label: Aravinda 2024
decisions.reason: Gives a maximum-atom inequality without adjacent ratios.

decisions.label: Marsiglietti--Melbourne Littlewood--Offord note
decisions.reason: Gives maximum-atom bounds for weighted and Poisson--binomial sums, not local curvature.

decisions.label: Kontorovich 2026
decisions.reason: Treats variance, unimodality, maximal atoms, and total variation without neighbouring-ratio estimates.

decisions.label: Broadie--Petkova 2026
decisions.reason: Treats Poisson-trinomial decomposition, real-rootedness, and mode location without descent magnitude.

decisions.label: Kurauskas 2026
decisions.reason: Gives asymptotic concentration comparisons, not a finite local-curvature inequality.

decisions.label: Kovacevic 2026
decisions.reason: Studies entropy of ternary sums and parity-conditioned ULC, not the target three-mass bound.

screening_ledger.scope: Compact ledger for every mathematically plausible theorem overlap promoted to primary-full-text review; bulk irrelevant title screening remains represented by the query result lists.
